_meta.description: ARIA — Pool de réponses hardcodées pour Board Game et fallback offline
_meta.note: Alimenter les pools vides progressivement. Minimum recommandé : 3 entrées par posture.

prudent: Let us involve civil society before engaging in any reform.
Patience is not inaction, it is a democratic strategy.
Let us assess social risks before accelerating.
A gradual transformation is better than a leap into the unknown.
Let us organize long-term citizen consultation.
radical: The system is locked! Force it open, now.

Let us rewrite the rules of the game, without delay.

statu_quo: Let institutions follow their natural course.

Let us not disrupt a balance that works.

messages: This question exceeds the ARIA Council's analytical capabilities. Please reformulate your request more precisely.
The ARIA Council is unable to process this input. Please ensure your question concerns a governmental topic.
Incomprehensible signal received. The ARIA protocol requires a question formulated in recognizable human language.
No competent ministry can be identified for this request. The Council invites you to ask a more... concrete question.
ARIA received your message. ARIA does not know what to do with it. Perhaps neither do you. Let's try something more governmental?

garbage: The Council has received your transmission. Following thorough analysis, it appears the content does not correspond to any known governance question. Please reformulate with the gravity your nation's future deserves.
The ministers examined your request with their customary seriousness. The verdict is unanimous: none of them understood it either. Please resubmit a question that the people might one day comprehend.
The ARIA institutional routing system attempted to process your question. It failed. This is not its usual performance. Please assist it by formulating a coherent question.
The Lighthouse searches. The Compass searches. All twelve ministers search. No one finds anything. The question may be of unfathomable depth — or it may be a typo. When in doubt, reformulate.

The Council has duly noted your contribution. It has been filed under 'Unresolved Enigmas of Global Governance'. To unlock the deliberative process, a question composed of recognizable words is required.
